sections.description: Vilpy plugin voor beheer van WordPress websites.
sections.installation: Upload de plugin, activeer hem en configureer de gewenste Vilpy-instellingen.
sections.changelog:
0.0.69

Replaced both plugin banner assets with the new update plugin artwork.

0.0.68

Updated the static update feed so WordPress can detect the latest Vilpy release correctly.

0.0.67

Forced a fixed 140px width for the dashboard welcome logo, including uploaded SVG logos.

0.0.66

Switched plugin updates from the GitHub API to a static update.json feed to avoid 403 errors.
